## File: `winbuild/TransformProjectToNET40.xslt`
```
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>

<xsl:stylesheet 
	version="1.0"
	xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"
	xmlns:ns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003"
	xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003"
	exclude-result-prefixes="ns">

	<xsl:output omit-xml-declaration="no" indent="yes" method="xml"/>

	<xsl:template match="node()|@*">
      <xsl:copy>
         <xsl:apply-templates select="node()|@*"/>
      </xsl:copy>
    </xsl:template>


    <xsl:template match='ns:Project/ns:PropertyGroup/ns:OutputPath'>
		<OutputPath><xsl:value-of select="translate(text(), 'net45', 'net40')"/></OutputPath>
	</xsl:template>

	<xsl:template match='ns:Project/ns:PropertyGroup/ns:DocumentationFile'>
		<DocumentationFile><xsl:value-of select="translate(text(), 'net45', 'net40')"/></DocumentationFile>
	</xsl:template>

	<xsl:template match="ns:Project/ns:PropertyGroup/ns:TargetFrameworkVersion">
		<TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.0</TargetFrameworkVersion>
	</xsl:template>

	<xsl:template match='ns:Project/ns:PropertyGroup/ns:DefineConstants'>
		<DefineConstants><xsl:value-of select="translate(text(), 'NET45', 'NET40')"/></DefineConstants>
	</xsl:template>

	<xsl:template match="ns:Project/ns:ItemGroup/ns:ProjectReference/@Include">
		<xsl:attribute name="Include">
			<xsl:value-of select="concat(substring-before(.,'.csproj'),'.NET40.csproj')"/>
		</xsl:attribute>
	</xsl:template>

	<xsl:template match="ns:Project/ns:ItemGroup/ns:Compile[contains(@Include,'Async')]" />
</xsl:stylesheet>
```

## File: `winbuild/build.proj`
```
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="4.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <RootPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\..</RootPath>
    <SourcePath>$(RootPath)\src</SourcePath>
    <PackagesPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\packages</PackagesPath>
    <MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>$(PackagesPath)\MSBuildTasks.1.5.0.214\tools</MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <Import Project="$(MSBuildCommunityTasksPath)\MSBuild.Community.Tasks.Targets"/>

  <Target Name="NonInteractiveBuild">
    <MSBuild Projects="$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\run_me_first.proj" />
    <CallTarget Targets="Build" />
  </Target>

  <Target Name="Build">
    <RemoveDir 
      Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output')"
      Directories="$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output" />
    <MSBuild Projects="$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\version.proj" />
    <MSBuild Projects="$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\info.proj" />
    <MSBuild 
      Projects="
        $(SourcePath)\Core\AggregateSource\AggregateSource.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\Core\AggregateSource.Content.ExplicitRouting\AggregateSource.Content.ExplicitRouting.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\Core\AggregateSource.Content.ExplicitStateExplicitRouting\AggregateSource.Content.ExplicitStateExplicitRouting.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\Testing\AggregateSource.Testing\AggregateSource.Testing.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\Testing\AggregateSource.Testing.Tests\AggregateSource.Testing.Tests.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\Testing\AggregateSource.Testing.NUnit\AggregateSource.Testing.NUnit.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\Testing\AggregateSource.Testing.Xunit\AggregateSource.Testing.Xunit.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\Core\AggregateSource.Tests\AggregateSource.Tests.csproj; 
        $(SourcePath)\SampleSource\SampleSource.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\EventStore\AggregateSource.EventStore\AggregateSource.EventStore.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\EventStore\AggregateSource.EventStore.Tests\AggregateSource.EventStore.Tests.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\EventStore\AggregateSource.EventStore.IntegratedTests\AggregateSource.EventStore.IntegratedTests.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\NEventStore\AggregateSource.NEventStore\AggregateSource.NEventStore.csproj;
        $(SourcePath)\NEventStore\AggregateSource.NEventStore.Tests\AggregateSource.NEventStore.Tests.csproj;"
      BuildInParallel="true" 
      Properties="Configuration=Release;OutputPath=$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\net45"
      UnloadProjectsOnCompletion="true"/>
  </Target>
</Project>
```

## File: `winbuild/info.proj`
```
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<Project DefaultTargets="Info" ToolsVersion="4.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <RootPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\..</RootPath>
    <SourcePath>$(RootPath)\src</SourcePath>
    <PackagesPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\packages</PackagesPath>
    <MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>$(PackagesPath)\MSBuildTasks.1.5.0.214\tools</MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildCommunityTasksPath)\MSBuild.Community.Tasks.Targets"/>

  <Target Name="Info">
  	<Time>
		<Output TaskParameter="Year" PropertyName="Year" />
	</Time>

	<AssemblyInfo 
		CodeLanguage="CS"
		OutputFile="$(SourcePath)\SharedAssemblyInfo.cs"
		AssemblyConfiguration="Release"
		AssemblyCompany="BitTacklr"
		AssemblyCopyright="Copyright $(Year), BitTacklr. All rights reserved."
		AssemblyCulture=""
		AssemblyProduct="AggregateSource"
		AssemblyTrademark="AggregateSource is a trademark of BitTacklr"
		ComVisible="false"
        CLSCompliant="false"
		/>
  </Target>
</Project>
```

```
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="4.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <RootPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\..</RootPath>
    <NuGetExe Condition="$(NuGetExe) == ''">$(RootPath)\.nuget\nuget.exe</NuGetExe>
    <NuGetApiKey Condition="$(NuGetApiKey) == ''"></NuGetApiKey>
    <PackagesPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\packages</PackagesPath>
    <MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>$(PackagesPath)\MSBuildTasks.1.5.0.214\tools</MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildCommunityTasksPath)\MSBuild.Community.Tasks.Targets"/>

  <Target Name="Pack">
    <Version 
      VersionFile="$(RootPath)\winbuild\master_version.txt" 
      MajorType="None" 
      MinorType="None" 
      BuildType="None" 
      RevisionType="None">
      <Output TaskParameter="Major" PropertyName="Major"/>
      <Output TaskParameter="Minor" PropertyName="Minor"/>
      <Output TaskParameter="Build" PropertyName="Build"/>
    </Version>
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) pack nuspec\AggregateSource.nuspec -Version $(Major).$(Minor).$(Build) -Symbols -NonInteractive -o "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output"' />
    <XmlUpdate
      Prefix="ns"
      Namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/packaging/2011/08/nuspec.xsd"
      XmlFileName="nuspec\AggregateSource.Content.ExplicitRouting.nuspec"

    <XmlUpdate
      Prefix="ns"
      Namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/packaging/2011/08/nuspec.xsd"
      XmlFileName="nuspec\AggregateSource.NEventStore.nuspec"
      XPath="/ns:package/ns:metadata/ns:dependencies/ns:group/ns:dependency[@id='AggregateSource']/@version"
      Value="$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build)" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) pack nuspec\AggregateSource.NEventStore.nuspec -Version $(Major).$(Minor).$(Build) -Symbols -NonInteractive -o "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output"' />
  </Target>

  <Target Name="Push">
    <Version 
      VersionFile="$(RootPath)\winbuild\master_version.txt" 
      MajorType="None" 
      MinorType="None" 
      BuildType="None" 
      RevisionType="None">
      <Output TaskParameter="Major" PropertyName="Major"/>
      <Output TaskParameter="Minor" PropertyName="Minor"/>
      <Output TaskParameter="Build" PropertyName="Build"/>
    </Version>

    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) push "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\AggregateSource.$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build).nupkg" $(NuGetApiKey) -NonInteractive -Source https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package'
          ContinueOnError="True" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) push "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\AggregateSource.Content.ExplicitRouting.$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build).nupkg" $(NuGetApiKey) -NonInteractive -Source https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package'
          ContinueOnError="True" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) push "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\AggregateSource.Content.ExplicitStateExplicitRouting.$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build).nupkg" $(NuGetApiKey) -NonInteractive -Source https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package'
          ContinueOnError="True" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) push "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\AggregateSource.Testing.$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build).nupkg" $(NuGetApiKey) -NonInteractive -Source https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package'
          ContinueOnError="True" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) push "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\AggregateSource.Testing.NUnit.$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build).nupkg" $(NuGetApiKey) -NonInteractive -Source https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package'
          ContinueOnError="True" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) push "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\AggregateSource.Testing.Xunit.$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build).nupkg" $(NuGetApiKey) -NonInteractive -Source https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package'
          ContinueOnError="True" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) push "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\AggregateSource.EventStore.$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build).nupkg" $(NuGetApiKey) -NonInteractive -Source https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package'
          ContinueOnError="True" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) push "$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\AggregateSource.NEventStore.$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build).nupkg" $(NuGetApiKey) -NonInteractive -Source https://www.nuget.org/api/v2/package'
          ContinueOnError="True" />
  </Target>
</Project>
```

## File: `winbuild/run_me_first.proj`
```
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<Project DefaultTargets="Run" ToolsVersion="4.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <RootPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\..</RootPath>
    <NuGetExe Condition="$(NuGetExe) == ''">$(RootPath)\.nuget\nuget.exe</NuGetExe>
  </PropertyGroup>

  <Target Name="Run">
    <CallTarget Targets="DownloadOrUpdateNuGet;RestorePackages" />
    <MSBuild Projects="$(RootPath)\lib\geteventstore_integration.proj" />
  </Target>

  <Target Name="DownloadOrUpdateNuGet">
    <Exec Command="$(NuGetExe) update -self" Condition="Exists('$(NuGetExe)')"/>
    <DownloadNuGet OutputFilename="$(NuGetExe)" Condition="!Exists('$(NuGetExe)')"/>
  </Target>

  <Target Name="RestorePackages">
    <ItemGroup>
      <BuildPackageConfigs Include="$(RootPath)\winbuild\packages.config" />
      <LibPackageConfigs Include="$(RootPath)\lib\packages.config" />
      <SourceCorePackageConfigs Include="$(RootPath)\src\Core\**\packages.config" />
      <SourceEventStorePackageConfigs Include="$(RootPath)\src\EventStore\**\packages.config" />
      <SourceNEventStorePackageConfigs Include="$(RootPath)\src\NEventStore\**\packages.config" />
      <SourceTestingPackageConfigs Include="$(RootPath)\src\Testing\**\packages.config" />
      <SourceSampleSourcePackageConfigs Include="$(RootPath)\src\SampleSource\packages.config" />
      <SourceReactivePackageConfigs Include="$(RootPath)\src\Reactive\**\packages.config" />
      <SourceRecipesPackageConfigs Include="$(RootPath)\src\Recipes\EventStoreShopping\**\packages.config" />
    </ItemGroup>
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) sources Remove -Name "NEventStore CI package source"' ContinueOnError="True" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) sources Add -Name "NEventStore CI package source" -Source "https://www.myget.org/F/neventstore-ci/"'
          ContinueOnError="True" />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) install %(BuildPackageConfigs.Identity) -o "$(RootPath)\winbuild\packages"' />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) install %(LibPackageConfigs.Identity) -o "$(RootPath)\lib\packages"' />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) install %(SourceCorePackageConfigs.Identity) -o "$(RootPath)\src\Core\packages"' />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) install %(SourceEventStorePackageConfigs.Identity) -o "$(RootPath)\src\EventStore\packages"' />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) install %(SourceNEventStorePackageConfigs.Identity) -o "$(RootPath)\src\NEventStore\packages"' />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) install %(SourceTestingPackageConfigs.Identity) -o "$(RootPath)\src\Testing\packages"' />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) install %(SourceReactivePackageConfigs.Identity) -o "$(RootPath)\src\Reactive\packages"' />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) install %(SourceSampleSourcePackageConfigs.Identity) -o "$(RootPath)\src\packages"' />
    <Exec Command='$(NuGetExe) install %(SourceRecipesPackageConfigs.Identity) -o "$(RootPath)\src\Recipes\EventStoreShopping\packages"' />
  </Target>

  <!-- Copied from NuGet.targets -->
  <UsingTask TaskName="DownloadNuGet" TaskFactory="CodeTaskFactory" AssemblyFile="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.Build.Tasks.v4.0.dll">
      <ParameterGroup>
          <OutputFilename ParameterType="System.String" Required="true" />
      </ParameterGroup>
      <Task>
          <Reference Include="System.Core" />
          <Using Namespace="System" />
          <Using Namespace="System.IO" />
          <Using Namespace="System.Net" />
          <Using Namespace="Microsoft.Build.Framework" />
          <Using Namespace="Microsoft.Build.Utilities" />
          <Code Type="Fragment" Language="cs">
              <![CDATA[
              try {
                  OutputFilename = Path.GetFullPath(OutputFilename);

                  Log.LogMessage("Downloading latest version of NuGet.exe...");
                  WebClient webClient = new WebClient();
                  webClient.DownloadFile("https://nuget.org/nuget.exe", OutputFilename);

                  return true;
              }
              catch (Exception ex) {
                  Log.LogErrorFromException(ex);
                  return false;
              }
          ]]>
          </Code>
      </Task>
  </UsingTask>
</Project>
```

## File: `winbuild/test.proj`
```
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="4.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <RootPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\..</RootPath>
    <SourcePath>$(RootPath)\src</SourcePath>
    <PackagesPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\packages</PackagesPath>
    <MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>$(PackagesPath)\MSBuildTasks.1.5.0.214\tools</MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildCommunityTasksPath)\MSBuild.Community.Tasks.Targets"/>

  <Target Name="Test">
    <MSBuild Projects="$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\build.proj" Targets="Build" />
    <CreateItem 
      Include="
      $(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\net45\AggregateSource.Content.ExplicitRouting.dll;
      $(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\net45\AggregateSource.Content.ExplicitStateExplicitRouting.dll;
      $(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\net45\AggregateSource.Tests.dll;
      $(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\net45\AggregateSource.Testing.Tests.dll;
      $(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\net45\AggregateSource.EventStore.Tests.dll;
      $(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\net45\AggregateSource.EventStore.IntegratedTests.dll;
      $(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\net45\SampleSource.dll;
      $(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\output\net45\AggregateSource.NEventStore.Tests.dll;
      ">
      <Output TaskParameter="Include" ItemName="AssembliesToTest" />
    </CreateItem>

    <NUnit3
        Assemblies="@(AssembliesToTest)"
        ToolPath="$(PackagesPath)\NUnit.ConsoleRunner.3.5.0\tools"
        Force32Bit="true"
        ContinueOnError="false"
        Framework="4.0"
        OutputXmlFile="$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\TestRunResult45.xml"/>
  </Target>
</Project>
```

## File: `winbuild/version.proj`
```
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<Project DefaultTargets="Version" ToolsVersion="4.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <PropertyGroup>
    <RootPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\..</RootPath>
    <SourcePath>$(RootPath)\src</SourcePath>
    <PackagesPath>$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\packages</PackagesPath>
    <MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>$(PackagesPath)\MSBuildTasks.1.5.0.214\tools</MSBuildCommunityTasksPath>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildCommunityTasksPath)\MSBuild.Community.Tasks.Targets"/>

  <Target Name="Version">
  	<Version 
		VersionFile="$(RootPath)\winbuild\master_version.txt" 
		MajorType="None" 
		MinorType="None" 
		BuildType="Increment" 
		RevisionType="None">
		<Output TaskParameter="Major" PropertyName="Major"/>
		<Output TaskParameter="Minor" PropertyName="Minor"/>
		<Output TaskParameter="Build" PropertyName="Build"/>
		<Output TaskParameter="Revision" PropertyName="Revision"/>
	</Version>

	<AssemblyInfo 
		CodeLanguage="CS"
		OutputFile="$(SourcePath)\SharedVersionInfo.cs"
		AssemblyVersion="$(Major).$(Minor).$(Build).$(Revision)"
		/>
  </Target>
</Project>
```

```
</package>
```
